headline: Massive grocery chain closes more supermarkets, lays off 100s
summary: Major supermarket chains, which have been battling big-box retailers, such as Walmart and Target, for the nation's grocery business, are closing underperforming stores, as well as fulfillment centers and warehouses that they no longer need. headline: Better Stock To Buy In 2026: Costco or Walmart
summary: Walmart (NASDAQ:WMT) reported a strong fourth quarter, capping a year defined by digital acceleration and advertising growth. Costco (NASDAQ:COST) followed in early March with results that reinforced its membership flywheel. Both are winning in the same consumer environment. The question is which model holds more upside. headline: Surescripts RxTransfer Saves Time for Pharmacists and Prescribers with Seamless Communication, Ensuring Patients Have Access to Needed Medications Without Delay
summary: ARLINGTON, Va., March 31, 2026--Surescripts®, the nation’s leading health intelligence network, announced strong adoption of RxTransfer, including across 4,800 Walmart locations, enabling pharmacies nationwide to electronically transfer prescriptions quickly and accurately.

headline: Trump’s Tax Cut Delivers at Least $65 Billion Windfall to Corporations
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Some of the country’s wealthiest corporations are calculating they owe far less to the Internal Revenue Service as a result of President Donald Trump’s overhauled tax code, underscoring how a law billed as a middle‑class cut also turned out to be a big win for Corporate America.Nearly a dozen of the 50 biggest US-listed companies attributed a drop in federal cash income taxes last year as a direct result of Trump’s $3.4 trillion sweeping tax law, according to a Bloomberg analysis

headline: Walmart closes facility, cuts jobs as 'power buyer' controversy grows
summary: Walmart, the world’s largest retailer, continues its restructuring from 2025. According to a recent Worker Adjustment and Retraining Notification (WARN) filing in Illinois, the grocery and pharmacy retail giant plans to close one of its Illinois facilities.
